description: Registry of StackShift seeding strategies. A seed is a reusable data/content scaffold that populates a specific area of the project when materialized. The directory is intentionally empty in v0.1.0 — add seeds by dropping a markdown file into this folder and registering it below. Same tier semantics as protocols.

tiers.required: Seeding is required for the workflow to produce a valid project state.
tiers.recommended: Seeding is a quality-of-life improvement — workflow functions without it.
tiers.optional: Project-specific or opt-in seeding for advanced scenarios.
